creator: isupov@moonhe.jinr.ru
text:
Possibly, not so severe ;) I propose following:

-----------cut here-----------
*** Makefile.orig	Tue Mar 30 21:11:17 2004
--- Makefile	Tue Apr 12 14:16:14 2005
***************
*** 16,23 ****
  
  ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386
  .ifdef WITHOUT_X11
! MAKE_ARGS+=	-DNO_X
! PLIST_SUB+=	X11="@comment "
  .else
  USE_XLIB=	yes
  PLIST_SUB+=	X11=""
--- 16,24 ----
  
  ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386
  .ifdef WITHOUT_X11
! BROKEN = "doscmd -r doesn't work"
! #MAKE_ARGS+=	-DNO_X
! #PLIST_SUB+=	X11="@comment "
  .else
  USE_XLIB=	yes
  PLIST_SUB+=	X11=""
-----------cut here-----------


     Isupov A.
